post.description: Follows the target user and returns the updated follower/followee counts.
Determines if the current user is following the target user.
Returns the total number of followees for a user.
Returns a paginated list of a user's followees.
Returns the total number of followers for a user.
Returns a paginated list of a user's followers.
Authenticates a user and returns an auth token and user profile.
Logs the user out and invalidates the session token.
Creates a new user account, returning an auth token and user profile.
Returns a paginated list of statuses from users the current user follows (their feed).
Creates a new status post for the current user.
Returns a paginated list of statuses created by the user (their story).
Unfollows the target user and returns the updated follower/followee counts.
Retrieves a user profile by their alias.
